g.text: FABIO capital per item for Ethiopia (ETH) — a FABIO-internal decomposition; the World Bank reference is
TOTAL-only, so no WB line is drawn. No external strand benchmark covers this country. Items grouped as
"Other" exactly as in the TOTAL figure (below 3% max |share| of WB across years). Rows: primary (ISIC-A) vs
